about.socials.meta.before: Full handles (Matrix ID, Discord tag) live on
now.title: now
now.description: What I am currently working on, learning, and paying attention to. Updated monthly.
now.intro.after: : what I’m paying attention to right now, not a retrospective.
now.body.heading: status
uses.title: uses
uses.description: Damien's homelab, dev machine, and gaming setup - hardware, OS, services, tools.
uses.intro.after: : what I actually run on, top to bottom. Reality-checked, not wishlist. Specific models are specs-in-motion - if something here looks stale, it probably is, and I’d appreciate the flag.
contact.title: contact
contact.description: How to reach Damien Thumerel - email, Matrix, Discord, GitHub. Available for freelance work and short-term contracts.
contact.intro: The shortest path is email. Everything else works too - pick whichever fits the shape of the conversation.
contact.channel.email.note: best for freelance inquiries - CF Email Obfuscation is on in prod.
contact.channel.github.note: projects, dotfiles, the source for this site.
contact.avail.taking.label: Taking:
contact.avail.taking.body: short-term freelance (web, small-scale infra, game-server setups, homelab consults).
contact.avail.not_taking.label: Not taking:
contact.avail.not_taking.body: any work I can't use as future portfolio item (doesn't need to be open-source, at least let me credit myself)
contact.avail.response.label: Response time:
contact.avail.response.body: usually within 12-24h on weekdays. Matrix is fastest.
contact.avail.timezone.label: Timezone:
contact.pgp.body: Not currently publishing a key. If you need encrypted email, ping me on Matrix first and we’ll sort it out.
projects.title: projects
projects.description: Selected projects by Damien Thumerel - homelab, infrastructure, and software work.
projects.intro: A snapshot of work that is either live, running in production somewhere, or archived with enough detail to be useful as reference. Code-facing projects link to repos; infrastructure projects describe what is deployed and why.
projects.skills.intro: Competencies that show up across projects without being projects of their own. Treat these as areas I am fluent in rather than line items on a CV.
projects.skills.docker.title: docker & container workflows
projects.skills.docker.body: Building, composing, and operating containerized services for the homelab and client work. Comfortable reasoning about layered images, networking, and volume strategy.
projects.skills.mc.title: minecraft plugins & server infra
projects.skills.mc.body: Years of Spigot/Paper plugin development and multi-server network infrastructure via BungeeCord / Velocity. Deep familiarity with JVM operations and the Minecraft modding ecosystem.
projects.skills.mail.title: mail servers & deliverability
projects.skills.mail.body: Running SMTP stacks end-to-end: Postfix, Dovecot, DKIM/SPF/DMARC, spam filtering, and the operational work of keeping a domain off blocklists.
projects.skills.ai.title: AI tooling & agent workflows
projects.skills.ai.body: Using local and API-based models as part of the development loop - code review, documentation, test scaffolding. Opinionated about where automation pays off and where it gets in the way.
blog.title: blog
blog.description: Writing by Damien Thumerel on homelab, infrastructure, careers, and learned-today notes.
blog.intro.before: Long-form and short-form notes. Mostly homelab and infrastructure work, with the occasional career post or today-I-learned. Prefer the feed?
blog.empty: No posts yet - first one lands soon.
